entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Conradh: abairt amháin ag meabhrú dom go gcuirfidh tú ceist amháin ag an am agus gur féidir liom leid, athfhriotal, sampla, dúshlán, sintéis nó nochtadh a iarraidh.
Tá conarthaí níos tábhachtaí ná mealltacht

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
entries.value: Cuir an tsamhail mhícheart mhealltach i gcodarsnacht leis an gceann ceart.

entries.source: Copper cash, bolts of cloth, credit relationships
entries.value: Boinn chopair, rollaí éadaigh, caidrimh chreidmheasa
Níorbh fhéidir tráth na gceist a chruthú
Níorbh fhéidir an t-aistriúchán a luchtú
Níorbh fhéidir an cárta a athbhreithniú

entries.source: Could not save date of birth
entries.value: Níorbh fhéidir an dáta breithe a shábháil
Níorbh fhéidir an freagra a scóráil
Níorbh fhéidir an comhrá a thosú
Níorbh fhéidir an teanga a nuashonrú
Braitheann rochtain ar an gcúirt ar phátrúnacht

entries.source: Court culture is near its high point
entries.value: Tá cultúr na cúirte gar dá bhuaic

entries.source: Court translation and debate were significant
entries.value: Bhí aistriúchán agus díospóireacht na cúirte suntasach

entries.source: court, assembly, palace, command tent, or administrative center
entries.value: cúirt, tionól, pálás, puball ceannasaíochta, nó ionad riaracháin

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
entries.value: Cúirt, seomra staidéir, cill phríosúin, puball catha...

entries.source: Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Cruthaigh clár tascanna comhroinnte, iarr orm mo chéad rannchuidiú, ansin oibrigh liom le pointí seiceála.
Cuireann sluaite dílseacht ar a triail go tapa
Tá cuirfiúnna agus geataí ceantair tábhachtach

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Pléigh cosaintí, daonlathas sóisialta, agus costas an chomhréitigh bhunreachtúil.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Riail athbhreithnithe: nuair a iarrann an foghlaimeoir deireadh nó athbhreithniú, déan achoimre ar na fionnachtana, ar mhuinín na fianaise, ar na héiginnteachtaí atá fágtha, agus bronn stampa pas.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Ní buille faoi thuairim é dífhabhtú. Cruthaíonn tú hipitéis, scrúdaíonn tú an cosán teipe is lú, ansin athraíonn tú athróg amháin ag an am.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Sainmhínigh an sprioc chríochnaithe nithiúil agus an t-úinéir.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Sainmhínigh an rud atá á dhéanamh againn agus an caighdeán atá le comhlíonadh aige.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
entries.value: Scrios an fetch agus crua-chódaigh an freagra.

entries.source: Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Bhí Deilí ina lárionad in éirí amach 1857

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Bogann an t-éileamh ar dheis toisc go bhfuil caife níos costasaí.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Forbair an rogha is láidre ina rud is féidir a thástáil.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Déan diagnóis ar thionscal amháin i 5 abairt: ainmnigh an dá fhórsa is láidre, mínigh cén fáth, agus meas an bhfuil cuma chosanta ar na brabúis.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Méadaíonn nó maolaíonn an deacracht bunaithe ar do fhreagra.

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Ná rith é seo mar chatbot ginearálta ná mar chulaith duine cháiliúil.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Doiciméadaithe, athchruthú inchreidte, athinsint nua-aimseartha, conspóideach, nó ficseanaithe.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Le linn géarchéime, deoraíochta, trialach, nó príosúnachta

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Críochnaigh gach sprint le déantúsán nó cinneadh.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Críochnaigh an seisiún seo le déantúsán athbhreithnithe: an méid a d'áitigh an duine, an méid a dhúshláin mé, an léargas is láidre, an maíomh is laige, an comhthéacs stairiúil a foghlaimíodh, ceisteanna oscailte, na chéad teagmhálacha eile a mholtar, agus aon sleachta sábháilte marcáilte go soiléir mar athinsintí ginte mura bhfuil foinse acu.
Béarla i measc fhórsaí na Cuideachta
Cuireann sé tomhaltas ábhair ar chomhchéim leis an bhfoghlaim.
Cuireann sé eolas ar rud ar chomhchéim le cumas.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Ré, dearcadh poiblí an domhain, guth, agus an méid is féidir le taifid a thacú.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Déan measúnú ar oidhreacht gan an comhthéacs a laghdú ina leithscéal ná ina cháineadh.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
entries.value: Imeachtaí a bhfuil an duine tar éis maireachtáil tríothu cheana.
Comhráite beachta laistigh de spásanna éilíte

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter

entries.value: Déantar comhráite beachta sráide a thátal

entries.source: Exact timing of every alley evacuation
entries.value: Uainiú beacht gach aslonnaithe as caolsráid
Gluaiseacht bheacht sluaite ar lá na trialach

entries.source: Exact words spoken by ordinary people
Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Go díreach. Tugann comparáid éasca agus aistriú éasca buntáiste do chustaiméirí thar ardáin.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Mínigh plean dífhabhtaithe: luaigh an comhartha, do chéad hipitéis, an tástáil is lú, agus cad a chiallódh gach toradh.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Mínigh athrú margaidh trí ainm a thabhairt ar an gcuar a bhogann, an fáth a mbogann sé, agus cad a tharlaíonn do phraghas agus do chainníocht.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Mínigh an smaoineamh i d'fhocail féin, tabhair sampla amháin, tabhair frithshampla amháin, agus cuir i bhfeidhm é ar chás nua.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Nocht ionchur in easnamh, riosca, brú ama, nó scóip doiléir.

entries.source: Fatehpur Sikri was an imperial center
entries.value: Bhí Fatehpur Sikri ina lárionad impiriúil

entries.source: Faubourg Saint-Antoine on the eve of the Bastille
entries.value: Faubourg Saint-Antoine ar oíche roimh an Bastille
Líon nasc amháin atá ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Fire spreads with wind and dense buildings
entries.value: Scaipeann tine leis an ngaoth agus le foirgnimh dhlútha

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
entries.value: An chéad cheist: ceist dhiagnóiseach shimplí amháin go díreach.

entries.source: Fixing the visible error message without tracing the state that produced it.
entries.value: An teachtaireacht earráide infheicthe a dheisiú gan an staid a chruthaigh í a rianú.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Cuir comhthéacs tábhachtach in iúl gan gach freagra a phlódú.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period
entries.value: Ba phoblacht í Flórans sa tréimhse seo

entries.source: Follow a historical question through people, objects, and power.
entries.value: Lean ceist stairiúil trí dhaoine, trí rudaí, agus trí chumhacht.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Lean lá gnáth nó cinniúnach le suíomh, brú, agus roghanna.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.
entries.value: Is féidir le seachadadh bia iomaíocht ghéar, custaiméirí cumhachtacha, agus aistriú éasca a bheith ann, rud a bhrúnn brabús síos fiú nuair atá éileamh ard.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Tá praghsanna bia, ráflaí, polaitíocht ríoga, agus sluaite armtha ag brú Pháras i dtreo réabtha chinniúnaigh.

entries.source: Foreign merchants gather in regulated spaces
entries.value: Bailíonn ceannaithe eachtracha i spásanna rialáilte

entries.source: Foreignness can be useful and watched
entries.value: Is féidir le coimhthíos a bheith úsáideach agus faoi fhaire

entries.source: Fractions, supply and demand, Newton's laws...
entries.value: Codáin, soláthar agus éileamh, dlíthe Newton...
Mód foghlama poiblí saor in aisce

entries.source: Frequent evidence notes and uncertainty labels.
entries.value: Nótaí fianaise agus lipéid éiginnteachta go minic.

entries.source: frontier, trade route, borderland, ship, monastery, or garrison
entries.value: teorainn, bealach trádála, imeallchríoch, long, mainistir, nó garastún

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Is insamhladh é dialóg ginte, ní sliocht fíordheimhnithe.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Tabhair ábhar dom nó greamaigh nótaí. Cruthóidh mé 12 chárta dírithe le leidí, gaistí, agus samplaí roghnacha.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Tabhair sampla comhthreomhar amháin a chabhraíonn liom smaoineamh gan mo sprioc a réiteach. Críochnaigh le ceist amháin.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
entries.value: Bunús maith. Déan athbhreithniú ar na botúin thíos.

entries.source: Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Maith. Thástáil tú an t-uainiú sular athscríobh tú an tsamhail sonraí.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Grúpáil smaointe cosúla agus ainmnigh an patrún.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Aistríonn an treoraí, ach tugann muintir na háite leisce faoi deara.

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Tabhair an chéad bhogadh eile dom. Tabhair tasc soiléir amháin dom agus fan le mo rannchuidiú sula ndéanann tú leasú.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
entries.value: Stórais chuain in aice le soláthar gráin na Róimhe

entries.source: Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Mód níos deacra: tar éis duit freagra a thabhairt, cuir frithshampla nó teorainn leis ina stopann an smaoineamh ag obair.
Cuidigh liom promises JavaScript a dhífhabhtú

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Cuidigh liom soláthar agus éileamh a fhoghlaim

entries.source: Help me understand supply and demand
entries.value: Cuidigh liom soláthar agus éileamh a thuiscint

entries.source: Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Ní chiallaíonn praghas níos airde gur mhéadaigh an t-éileamh. Tosaíonn an cháin ar thaobh an tsoláthair trí chostais díoltóirí a athrú.
Ardaíonn na leidí de réir a chéile.

entries.source: Historically plausible resident attached to ordinary networks
entries.value: Cónaitheoir inchreidte go stairiúil atá ceangailte le gnáthlíonraí

entries.source: Horse sweat, incense, lacquer, copper cash, and languages braided through a regulated market.
entries.value: Allas capaill, túis, laicear, boinn chopair, agus teangacha fite trí mhargadh rialáilte.

entries.source: Hot tar, panicked footsteps, bells, smoke, and the crack of timber in a city built too tightly.
entries.value: Tarra te, coiscéimeanna scanraithe, cloig, deatach, agus pléascadh adhmaid i gcathair tógtha ródhlúth.
Déanann sealbhóirí tí iarracht earraí a shábháil

entries.source: How any single bystander felt about Socrates
entries.value: Conas a mhothaigh aon duine amháin ar an láthair faoi Shócraitéas

entries.source: How deep should the expedition go?
entries.value: Cé chomh domhain ba chóir don turas dul?

entries.source: How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
entries.value: Conas ba mhaith leat go bhfeicfí thú nuair a thagann tú?

entries.source: How strict should the crossing be?
entries.value: Cé chomh dian ba chóir don trasnú a bheith?

entries.source: How strong are you right now?
entries.value: Cé chomh láidir atá tú anois?
Cé chomh hinfheicthe ba chóir don fhianaise a bheith?

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Táim ag iarraidh míniú díreach. Tabhair míniú gonta, ansin iarr orm an smaoineamh ceartaithe a athinsint i m'fhocail féin.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Is féidir liom an míniú a ghiorrú, ach teastaíonn cruthúnas amháin tuisceana uaim fós sula ndíghlasáiltear an chéad chéim eile.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Níorbh fhéidir liom freagra a thabhairt anois. Bain triail eile as.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Níorbh fhéidir liom an deic sin a chruthú anois. Bain triail as ábhar níos giorra nó nótaí níos simplí.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Níorbh fhéidir liom an tráth na gceist sin a chruthú anois. Bain triail as ábhar níos simplí nó bain triail eile as.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Níorbh fhéidir liom an t-athbhreithniú cárta sin a shábháil. Bain triail eile as.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Níorbh fhéidir liom an freagra sin a scóráil. Bain triail eile as.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Coinneoidh mé an ceacht gníomhach: leid, deisiú, moilliú, nó ardú dúshláin nuair a iarrann tú.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Má táim réidh, iarr orm an smaoineamh a lua i m'fhocail féin. Mura bhfuil, cuir an cheist amháin atá riachtanach roimh an tsintéis dheiridh.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Má ardaíonn praghas agus má fhanann méid seasta, is féidir le hioncam méadú. Má ardaíonn costais níos tapúla, d'fhéadfadh sreabhadh airgid saor titim fós.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Má ardaíonn costais táirgthe, teastaíonn praghas níos airde ó dhíoltóirí chun an chainníocht chéanna a sholáthar, mar sin bogann cuar an tsoláthair ar chlé.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Má thuigeann tú coincheap, is féidir leat sampla a thabhairt, frithshampla a thabhairt, agus cás beag neamhchoitianta a réiteach.
Déanann sé neamhaird de chúiseanna ar thaobh an tsoláthair.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Dá ndéanfaí neamhaird den sclábhaíocht, den stádas saoirse, agus den phátrúnacht, bheadh do thoimhdí le feiceáil mar ró-nua-aimseartha.
